and
troubled by heavy expenditure. In the 3rd he causes heroism,
virtues, wealth, happiness, unassailability, amiability, hostility
towards brothers or lack of brothers, and wealth got by hard
labour. In the 4th causes loss of friends, mother, lands, happi-
ness, house and vehicles. He will also be sickly and dwelling in
others' houses. In the 5th he causes loss of happiness and sons,
many disasters, a back-biting nature and a mean mind. He may
act very cruelly and be of bad character. In the 6th he causes
excessive lust, wealth, fame, victory, kingship, laziness and mean-
mindedness. In the 7th he makes one do improper acts, afflicted
by diseases, wander away, lose his wife and defeated by women.
In the 8th he makes one have a deformed body, poor, short-
lived condemend by men, and devoid of wife and children. In
the 9th Mars makes one a murderer or bandit, hateful though
being a friend of the king, and without father. In the JOth he
